phases.title: Historical MVP QAIC foundation
phases.head: pre-R6J-history
phases.tests: Historical sealed packs and prior QA gates
phases.evidence: Baseline project context, CLASP import inventory, CDC tracker exports, prior Reflex cockpit foundations and MVP QAIC source contracts.
phases.next_action: Keep visible as historical context and do not edit blindly.

phases.title: Real CDC / Dev Tracker Cockpit
phases.head: d94256b1b4a6
phases.evidence: d94256b1b4a6 /cdc-dev-tracker, /cdc-tracker and /dev-tracking active with real V25 CDC Delivery Tracker data, not route-only validation.
phases.next_action: Keep as regression gate for CDC and Dev Tracker views.

phases.title: Global Migration + Decision Workbench
phases.head: b4556e1c4fff
phases.tests: py_compile OK, import smoke OK, R6J regression 4 passed
phases.evidence: b4556e1c4fff global_migration_page.py wires Migration Decision Workbench and preserves R6J cockpit evidence.
phases.next_action: Use Decision Workbench as migration decision support, not as a replacement for CDC/Dev tracking.

phases.title: Classify and park obsolete R3/R4 untracked files
phases.head: b4556e1c4fff
phases.tests: Read-only audit and clean status after park
phases.evidence: Five obsolete non-tracked R3/R4 files parked outside repo; KEEP=0 PARK=5 DELETE=0; working tree clean before R6M.
phases.next_action: Do not reintroduce route/fallback-only tests unless tied to real content evidence.

phases.title: Auto-live CDC + Dev Tracker lifecycle cockpit
phases.head: live-git-head-at-render
phases.evidence: Both /dev-tracking and CDC tracker views read this lifecycle contract and live Git state so past, active and future phases stay visible during development.
phases.next_action: Seal R6M-R7 only after UI source has no shell-only status and tests prove real content model.

phases.title: Source of Truth Migration Cockpit integration
phases.head: future
phases.tests: Must verify CLASP imports, CDC static source and optional decision journal source availability.
phases.evidence: Use real CSV inventory to classify keep Sheets, keep Apps Script, rewrite Python/Reflex and future BigQuery targets.
phases.next_action: Build only after CDC and Dev Tracker lifecycle is sealed.

phases.title: Prompt / GEM Portfolio human-review module
phases.head: future
phases.tests: Human-review-only prompt tests, image/copy-paste portfolio input tests, no execution path tests.
phases.evidence: Prepare private local prompt cockpit without broker, order, sizing, secret or live Revolut X action.
phases.next_action: Start after migration cockpit traceability is reliable.

phases.title: Private release candidate
phases.head: future
phases.tests: Full targeted regression and manual visual smoke.
phases.evidence: All prior phases must be visible and traceable in CDC and Dev Tracker before private release candidate.
phases.next_action: Prepare only after R6N/R6P are stable.
